title: Teasing Master Takagi-san
description:
Nishikata is a middle school student who constantly finds himself being teased by his clever and playful classmate Takagi. Determined to get revenge and embarrass her back, he spends his days coming up with different plans and challenges, only for Takagi to easily predict his actions and turn the situation against him every single time. Despite their endless teasing battles, the two slowly grow closer through their everyday interactions and shared moments at school and around town.

As Nishikata continues trying to outsmart Takagi, he gradually begins realizing that her teasing often hides genuine affection and enjoyment of spending time with him. Through lighthearted comedy, awkward romantic moments, and warm slice-of-life storytelling, Teasing Master Takagi-san presents a sweet and relaxing story about young love, friendship, and the small but meaningful moments shared between two classmates.
